recipe.name: Move files from one folder to another folder automatically in Box
recipe.description:
With this workflow, whenever a new file is created/uploaded in the specified folder in your Box account, the file will be automatically added in another folder. 


How it works:

At regular intervals, webMethods.io Integration will retrieve details of the specified folder and check whether there exist any files in the folder.


Case 1:

If any files exist, webMethods.io Integration will automatically create a new folder named with the current date and time in MM-DD-YYYY HH:mm:ss format. 

Case 2:

If no files exist, webMethods.io Integration will automatically terminate the workflow. 


Prerequisites:

Box account


Note: For this workflow, we have used a Clock trigger that runs every 24 hours, which means, this workflow will be executed once every 24 hours. However, you can configure the Clock Trigger to run as per your requirements.
